title: Cobblemon Survival Guide Modpack
description: The perfect Modpack for Cobblemon Survival mode! This is the exact modpack that Pocketcraft used for his Cobblemon Survival Guide!
body:
# This is the BEST Modpack for Cobblemon Survival Mode!

If you follow my Cobblemon Survival Guide on YouTube then this is the exact modpack that I use in that series. I've had a lot of people ask what mod's I'm using so I figured I would create this modpack for you. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SDwPwpcjfs4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This modpack introduces several awesome features:

### Gym Leaders and Battles:
- The Radical Red Mod adds gym leaders and NPC trainers that you can fight. Episode 2 of the Survival Guide gives a full breakdown on how to use this.
- The Cobblemon Fight or Flight Mod causes wild Pokemon to attack you Legends Arceus style which is a ton of fun! It also allows your Pokemon to defend you from mobs which is a party!

### Legendary, Mythical, Mega & Paradox Pokemon
- I'm a huge fan of the all the mons datapack and recommend it to everyone, it adds almost every legendary, mythical and paradox Pokemon into Cobblemon. If you want to know how to find these Pokemon, check out the rare pokemon spawn playlist on my channel or the all the mons discord.
- Cobblemon mega showdown adds mega evolution to the game making for a very exciting feature!

### Navigation & Rare Pokemon Hunting
- This modpack uses Xaeros minimap to help find your way, notice rare pokemon spawns nearby and navigate the world.
- The Pokenav mod allows you to know what Pokemon can spawn in your area
- The Cobblemon Spawn notification mod will notify you if Legendary, Mythical, Paradox or shiny Pokemon spawn nearby

### Miscellaneous 
This modpack also features a few other quality of life improvement mods like livelier pokemon, pasture block collector, Cobblemon capture xp mod and the Cobblemon rider mod. Hope you enjoy!

Head over to the channel if you'd like to watch the series :)
[Pocketcraft's Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@pocketcraft3440?sub_confirmation=1)
